item_specifications.special_feature: Adjustable, Easy to Clean, Easy to Use, Lightweight, Waterproof

about_item: 【Convenient for Travel】Thanks to this stylish pet carrier bag, whether it's shopping, traveling by car, traveling by plane or going to the pet hospital, it provides a comfortable and spacious travel experience for your pet.

【Three Sides Breathable】Three sides breathable mesh ensures enough breathability and comfort for your small dog and cat. The top and sides can be opened so you can easily interact with your pet while traveling, and it fully complies with the airline's three-side breathability requirement.

【High Quality Material】Our soft side dog purse is made of high quality smooth vegan leather. No color fading, no deformation, breathable, lightweight, scrubbable and soft. The two pockets on the side and back can hold some travel essentials, such as snacks, cell phone, keys, wallet and so on. Very convenient.

[Specification]Length 16 inches, width 7 inches, height 11.5 inches. Tip: Please make sure your small dog/cat/rabbit is the right size before purchasing, please be careful if your pet is too big or too heavy, it is recommended that pets under 10 pounds will be more comfortable.

【After-Sale Service】Stylish, comfortable and breathable, I believe this tote bag must be the best choice for you to travel with your small pet. Please contact us if you have any questions, happy to serve you at any time.

summary.text: Customers find the pet carrier looks like a regular purse and is perfect for small dogs like Yorkies, with plenty of room. The bag is comfortable to carry, functional, and easy to transport, with one customer noting it's great for flying. While some customers find it sturdy, others mention it's not as sturdy as expected.

authors_reviews.title: It's Perfect!
authors_reviews.text: I have a 3 1/5 lb Yorkie Poo. I usually carry her in a pouch but needed a stealthy carrier for an upcoming wedding. This was perfect. It looks like a nice purse, is well made, very roomy (a much larger fur baby will easily fit), and I especially like the fact it zips closed so she can't poke her head out. There is plenty of air flow for my sweet Charlee. The pad on the bottom of the bag is slightly padded and removable. I added a small blanket for extra padding and to take up space since my girl is so tiny. I also like the length of the shoulder straps. The bag is easy to carry on my shoulder like a purse. This was exactly what I needed. Well, it could be smaller for my tiny girl but it works well, looks nice, she is secure inside and airflow is good.
authors_reviews.author: Sunlovinj

authors_reviews.title: Stylish, Good Quality, and Puppy-Approved!
authors_reviews.text: Really nice quality bag! I love that it looks like a regular purse — so stylish and discreet. To make it more stable for my puppy, I just added a small folded blanket at the bottom, and it works perfectly.My puppy feels cozy and secure inside, and it’s great for quick trips or outings. The material feels durable, and the design is super cute. Definitely recommend if you're looking for a fashionable and functional carrier!
authors_reviews.author: Ro

authors_reviews.title: Good quality
authors_reviews.text: This pet carrot is so cute! Looks so nice, unlike carrying a cheap dog carrier.looks like a designer bag. Good quality.
authors_reviews.author: Shonda LaCelle

authors_reviews.title: Fashionable and Sturdy but Needs to be Bigger
authors_reviews.text: Love this carrier. Only wish it was a bit bigger for our Maltipoo. It was fine when she was a puppy but now that she had reached adolescence, it's too snug with no room for her to move around in.
authors_reviews.author: My S.

authors_reviews.title: Great Dog carrier
authors_reviews.text: Excellent item and our dog loves it! Quality material and appears well made and fits our 5.8lb Chihuahua nicely with plenty of room.
authors_reviews.author: Ken S

authors_reviews.title: Great for my mini Dachsund, 10 lbs
authors_reviews.text: Excellent for a small dog 10lbs and under.A bottom and the yellow mesh makes it so people just Inside. Sometimes I even put a scarf over it if I want to be very stealthy with my dog.I take it in the grocery store and put it in the child tea in my mini dachsund pops her head out! It does close completely if you need to and has great pockets. This bag is great for flying!! Great for every day activities or going to restaurants with your dog if you sit in a booth, you can put the bag next to you. I give my dog valerian and chamomile tablets and she just takes a nap if I have an important meeting. When she was a puppy, she used to sleep in this bag because it is the perfect size and a kennel would be way too big for a mini dachshund puppy. Now it’s her happy place and as soon as she sees it, she jumps in there. People are amazed that she goes in a bag like this, but it’s probably because she slept in it when she was a puppy! Also, it looks like real leather from afar and the brown one looks classy!
authors_reviews.author: Prof. Rebecca

authors_reviews.title: Not as sturdy as I thought. But ok.
authors_reviews.text: Cute bag. Kinda flimsy. NOT LEATHER. A little expensive for the quality. Good bag though. I had to reinforce it with a small blanket for the bottom. I’ll be getting a different one soon. But this will do for now. (My dog is 3.5 lbs)
authors_reviews.author: Khristina Wrase

authors_reviews.title: GREAT BAG!! This is the one.
authors_reviews.text: I looked at so many bags for my mini dauschund puppy and was nervous to get this one but once it arrived I knew I made the right choice. Build quality is superb, it's comfortable to carry, was an excellent value, and the size is perfect for her. She was only 3 lb but will still fit in it when she's bigger, probably comfortable up to 8 lb. Since she is long this style is perfect and with the external pocket and cup holder it's very functional. An easy to use bag for your pup on the go!
authors_reviews.author: Sheffam

other_countries_reviews.title: ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Absolute Empfehlung für Städtereisen & Alltag
other_countries_reviews.text: Ich habe diese Hunde-Tragetasche speziell für Städtereisen und City-Trips gekauft – für lange Stadtbummel sowie Fahrten mit Bus und U-Bahn (u. a. Paris, Berlin) – und bin wirklich begeistert.Die Tasche ist extrem stilvoll und sieht auf den ersten Blick aus wie eine hochwertige Handtasche. Niemand würde vermuten, dass sich darin ein Hund befindet – perfekt, wenn man sich in Cafés, Museen oder öffentlichen Verkehrsmitteln unauffällig bewegen möchte.✨ Was ich besonders liebe:• Sehr hochwertiges Material, stabil und dennoch weich• Trägt sich angenehm, auch über längere Zeit• Mein Hund fühlt sich sicher und entspannt – kein Vergleich zu klassischen Transportboxen• Ideal für kleine Hunde, die gerne nah bei ihrem Menschen sind• Super praktisch für Reisen, Einkäufe und Alltag in der StadtIch habe die Tasche gleich in Braun und Schwarz bestellt, weil beide Farben wunderschön sind.Braun wirkt besonders warm, elegant und wie ein echtes Fashion-Statement, Schwarz ist zeitlos, minimalistisch und passt zu allem. Ehrlich gesagt: Ich kann mich kaum entscheiden, welche ich behalten soll 😅Für alle, die viel reisen, ihren Hund stilvoll und stressfrei mitnehmen möchten und eine schicke Alternative zur klassischen Hundetasche suchen: Diese Tasche ist jeden Cent wert.👜🐶 Funktional, elegant und absolut city-tauglich.
other_countries_reviews.author: SNicks

other_countries_reviews.title: Excellent
other_countries_reviews.text: This dog carrier is amazing, great design,extremely attractive. Built well for a small dog. Our dog will be around 7 lbs once fully grown and this will be perfect for this size ddog.looks like a ladies purse not a dog carrier which is what I waslooking for. Definitely would buy it again if needed.
other_countries_reviews.author: Alison

other_countries_reviews.title: Stylish
other_countries_reviews.text: Unfortunately, I received the bag with scuff marks. That being said, it is of good quality and Fifi is super comfortable in there.I wanted a stylish pet bag & will definitely buy more colours.
other_countries_reviews.author: Elle ♡
